texto: Recovery feels like shit. It didn't feel like I was doing something good
autor: it felt like I was giving up. It feels like having to learn how to walk all over again.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it felt like I was giving up. It feels like having to learn how to walk all over again.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Recovery feels like shit. It didn't feel like I was doing something good” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, portia-de-rossi, recovery pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
